items.title: Context Economy & Filter Pipeline (Article XIV)
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Implement PRD-26 context filter pipeline: sacred-content preservation, compression, telemetry" --max-waves 8
items.verifyCondition: Filter pipeline wired into forge/party, savings ledger written, sacred content never compressed

items.title: Community & Adoption Growth
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve adoption: landing page, docs site, quickstart guide, contribution guidelines" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: README has quickstart section, CONTRIBUTING.md exists, SECURITY.md exists

items.title: Autonomous Operation Depth
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Deepen autonomy: improve self-correction, loop cycles, convergence quality" --max-waves 8
items.verifyCondition: Self-improve loop completes without human intervention in dry-run mode

items.title: Error Handling & Resilience
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Add robust error handling, try/catch, custom errors, graceful degradation" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: All async functions have error handling, no unhandled promise rejections

items.title: UX Polish & Accessibility
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve UX: error messages, progress indicators, CLI help text, accessibility" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: All CLI commands have --help, error messages are actionable

items.title: Convergence & Self-Healing Loops
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Strengthen convergence: verify-repair cycles, auto-recovery from failures" --max-waves 8
items.verifyCondition: Autoforge completes with self-recovery from at least one simulated failure

items.title: Ecosystem & MCP Integration
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Expand ecosystem: MCP tools, skills, plugin manifest, provider support" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: MCP server exposes >= 15 tools, skill registry discovers >= 10 skills

items.title: Self-Improvement Mechanisms
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Strengthen self-improvement: lessons capture, retro depth, convergence loops" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: Lessons file has >= 10 entries, retro score delta is positive

items.title: Code Maintainability
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve maintainability: reduce complexity, consistent patterns, type safety" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: No functions > 100 LOC, TypeScript strict mode passes, no as-any casts

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Optimize performance: eliminate N+1 patterns, add caching, async batching" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: No nested await loops, no O(n²) patterns in hot paths

items.title: Test Coverage & Quality
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Add comprehensive tests: unit, integration, edge cases" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: Coverage >= 85%, all tests pass, npm run verify passes

items.title: Documentation Quality
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve documentation: README, JSDoc, examples, PDSE clarity" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: PDSE documentation score >= 85, README covers install/usage/examples

items.title: Planning Artifact Quality
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve planning artifacts: SPEC, PLAN, TASKS completeness and clarity" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: All PDSE artifacts score >= 85, no anti-stub patterns

items.title: Security Hardening
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Fix security issues: input validation, secrets management, injection prevention" --max-waves 6
items.verifyCondition: No hardcoded secrets, all inputs validated, npm audit passes

items.title: Token Economy & Budget Controls
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve token economy: budget fences, task routing, complexity classification" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: Budget fence prevents overspend in dry-run mode, task-router routes correctly

items.title: Core Functionality Completeness
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Complete all missing features and close spec gaps" --max-waves 8
items.verifyCondition: All SPEC requirements implemented + danteforge verify passes

items.title: Developer Experience
items.forgeCommand: danteforge forge "Improve DX: better error messages, faster onboarding, intuitive CLI design" --max-waves 5
items.verifyCondition: New user can run init + first command with no external docs
